debug_info.goal:
d : Type u_1
inst✝² : Fintype d
inst✝¹ : DecidableEq d
𝕜 : Type u_5
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
A B : Matrix d d 𝕜
hA : A.IsHermitian
hB : B.IsHermitian
hAB : Commute A B
j : d
⊢ A.mulVec ((@Matrix.sharedEigenbasis d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB) j) =
    @Matrix.SharedEigenbasis.sharedEigenvalueA d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB j •
      WithLp.ofLp ((@Matrix.sharedEigenbasis d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB) j)

have hA' := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
  have hB' := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB
  have hAB' := commute_euclideanLin hAB
  simp only [sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis]
  set e := Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp : Fintype.card d = _)
  set basis := (hA'.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hB' hAB').subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl
    (hA'.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB')
  have hmem := DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_mem _ rfl
    (hA'.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB') (e.symm j)
  simp only [Submodule.mem_inf, Module.End.mem_eigenspace_iff] at hmem
  have hAv : A.toEuclideanLin (basis (e.symm j)) = (e.symm j).1.1 • basis (e.symm j) := hmem.1
  simp only [toEuclideanLin_apply'] at hAv
  have : (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j : EuclideanSpace 𝕜 d) = basis (e.symm j) := by
    simp [sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis, OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply]
  conv_lhs => rw [this]
  conv_rhs => rw [show WithLp.ofLp (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) = basis (e.symm j) from this]
  rw [hAv]
  congr 1
  simp only [sharedEigenvalueA, this]
  rw [hAv]
  simp only [inner_smul_right, OrthonormalBasis.inner_self, mul_one]
  exact RCLike.re_ofReal _

have hA' := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
  have hB' := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB
  have hAB' := commute_euclideanLin hAB
  let basis := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB
  let dec := hA'.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hB' hAB'
  let subBasis := dec.subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl (hA'.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB')
  have hj : ∃ i, basis j = subBasis (Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp : Fintype.card d = _) j) := by
    simp only [sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis, OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply]
    exact ⟨_, rfl⟩
  obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := hj
  have hmem := DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_mem dec (by simp) 
    (hA'.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB') (Fintype.equivOfCardEq _ j)
  simp only [Submodule.mem_inf, Module.End.mem_eigenspace_iff] at hmem
  have heig : A.toEuclideanLin (basis j) = (Fintype.equivOfCardEq _ j).1.1 • basis j := by
    rw [← Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply_coe]
    convert hmem.1
  simp only [sharedEigenvalueA, sharedEigenbasis]
  ext k
  simp only [Pi.smul_apply, WithLp.ofLp_apply]
  have : A *ᵥ (basis j : d → 𝕜) = ((Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp : Fintype.card d = _) j).1.1 : 𝕜) • (basis j : d → 𝕜) := by
    have := congr_arg (WithLp.toLp (p := 2)) heig
    simp only [map_smul] at this
    convert this using 1
    · simp [Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply_coe]
    · simp [WithLp.toLp_smul]
  rw [congr_fun this k]
  simp only [Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul]
  congr 1
  have hre : RCLike.re (dotProduct (basis j) (A *ᵥ WithLp.ofLp (basis j))) = 
      RCLike.re ((Fintype.equivOfCardEq _ j).1.1 : 𝕜) := by
    rw [congr_arg (fun x => dotProduct (basis j) x) this]
    simp only [dotProduct_smul, OrthonormalBasis.coe_toBasis_repr_apply, 
      OrthonormalBasis.repr_self, Finsupp.single_eq_same]
    simp [mul_one]
  simp only [basis] at hre
  rw [hre]
  exact (RCLike.ofReal_re _).symm

unfold sharedEigenbasis LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis sharedEigenvalueA
  set D := DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis _ _ _
  set e := Fintype.equivOfCardEq _
  have hv := D.toBasis.mem_subordinateOrthonormalBasis (e.symm j)
  simp only [Submodule.mem_inf, Module.End.mem_genEigenspace_one] at hv
  have heig : A.toEuclideanLin (D (e.symm j)) = _ • (D (e.symm j)) := hv.1
  simp only [toEuclideanLin_eq_toLin] at heig
  ext i
  have := congr_fun (congrArg (↑) heig) i
  simp only [Matrix.toLin'_apply, OrthonormalBasis.coe_reindex, Function.comp_apply,
    Equiv.symm_symm, PiLp.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul] at this ⊢
  convert this using 2
  simp only [WithLp.ofLp, OrthonormalBasis.coe_reindex, Function.comp_apply, Equiv.symm_symm]
  congr 1
  rw [RCLike.smul_re]
  · ring
  · exact isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA _ _

simp only [sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis, sharedEigenvalueA]
  set D := Commute.isSymmetric_directSumDecomposition (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA)
    (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB)
  set basis := D.subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl
    (IsHermitian.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA)
      (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB))
  set e := Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp : Fintype.card d = _)
  have hmem := DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_mem D.isInternal rfl
    (IsHermitian.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA)
      (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB)) (e.symm j)
  simp only [Submodule.mem_inf, Module.End.mem_eigenspace_iff] at hmem
  have hAv := hmem.1
  conv_lhs => rw [OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply, ← Matrix.toLin'_mulVec,
    Matrix.toLin'_toEuclideanLin, ← EuclideanSpace.equiv_symm_apply]
  rw [hAv]
  simp only [OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply, EuclideanSpace.equiv_symm_apply,
    OrthonormalBasis.toBasis_coe_eq_coe]
  congr 1
  · simp only [Matrix.toLin'_toEuclideanLin, ← Matrix.toLin'_mulVec]
    rfl
  · rfl

have hA' := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
  have hB' := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB
  have hAB' := commute_euclideanLin hAB
  have hmem := (hA'.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hB' hAB').subordinateOrthonormalBasis_mem rfl
    (hA'.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB')
  simp only [sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis]
  set b := (hA'.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hB' hAB').subordinateOrthonormalBasis rfl
    (hA'.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB')
  set e := Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp : Fintype.card d = _)
  have hbmem : ∀ i, b i ∈ Module.End.eigenspace A.toEuclideanLin (b.index i).1 ⊓
      Module.End.eigenspace B.toEuclideanLin (b.index i).2 := hmem
  specialize hbmem (e j)
  rw [Submodule.mem_inf, Module.End.mem_eigenspace_iff] at hbmem
  simp only [OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply, sharedEigenvalueA, toEuclideanLin_apply']
  rw [hbmem.1]
  simp only [Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul, PiLp.ofLp_apply]
  congr 1
  simp only [inner_smul_right, OrthonormalBasis.inner_left_self, mul_one]
  exact RCLike.ofReal_re _

have hA' := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
  have hB' := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB
  have hAB' := commute_euclideanLin hAB
  set basis := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB
  set v := basis j
  have hv : v ∈ ⨆ (μ₁₂ : Module.End.Eigenvalues A.toEuclideanLin × Module.End.Eigenvalues B.toEuclideanLin),
      Module.End.eigenspace A.toEuclideanLin μ₁₂.1 ⊓ Module.End.eigenspace B.toEuclideanLin μ₁₂.2 := by
    simp only [Submodule.mem_iSup]
    have := DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_subordinate
      (hA'.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' hB' hAB') rfl
      (hA'.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' hB')
      ((Fintype.equivOfCardEq (by simp)).symm j)
    exact Submodule.mem_iSup_of_mem _ this
  obtain ⟨μ, hμ⟩ := Submodule.mem_iSup.mp hv
  simp only [Submodule.mem_inf, Module.End.mem_eigenspace_iff] at hμ
  have hAv := hμ.1
  rw [Matrix.toEuclideanLin_mulVec_eq] at hAv
  conv_lhs => rw [show (v : EuclideanSpace 𝕜 d) = WithLp.ofLp v from rfl, ← hAv]
  congr 1
  simp only [sharedEigenvalueA, RCLike.smul_re, smul_eq_mul]
  rw [← hAv]
  simp only [EuclideanSpace.inner_eq_star_dotProduct, star_smul]
  rw [dotProduct_smul]
  have hnorm : ‖(v : EuclideanSpace 𝕜 d)‖ = 1 := basis.orthonormal.1 j
  rw [EuclideanSpace.norm_eq] at hnorm
  have hdot : dotProduct (star v) v = 1 := by
    simp only [EuclideanSpace.inner_eq_star_dotProduct] at hnorm
    have : Real.sqrt (RCLike.re (dotProduct (star v) v)) = 1 := hnorm
    have hpos : 0 ≤ RCLike.re (dotProduct (star v) v) := inner_self_nonneg (𝕜 := 𝕜)
    have hre : RCLike.re (dotProduct (star v) v) = 1 := by nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt hpos]
    have him : RCLike.im (dotProduct (star v) v) = 0 := inner_self_im (𝕜 := 𝕜) v
    exact RCLike.ext hre him
  rw [hdot, mul_one]
